title: Portuguese-Style Pilaf
description: A flavorful, gluten-free pilaf dish inspired by Portuguese cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add Portuguese spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add fluffy rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add garlicky rice and chicken broth to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro.
